name: Analytics comparisons & breakdowns
description: Extend analytics with comparison and breakdown views. Backend: GET /api/v1/analytics/comparison?period=YYYY-MM (returns current month vs previous month: total spend delta, top categories delta, payer attribution — who paid most and percent of total), GET /api/v1/analytics/groups?period=YYYY-MM (per-group spend aggregation for the period). Frontend: adds Month-over-Month comparison section to the analytics page (delta badges, trend arrow), Payer Attribution bar chart (stacked by member), and a Groups tab showing spend per group. Per docs/product-specs/analytics-overview.md.
